name: hmventures
description: Shared Claude Code skills for HM Ventures (Howard + Mike).

plugins.name: social-post
plugins.description: Create and publish a social media post from a file or inline content. Picks accounts, fills required fields, confirms it actually went live. woopsocial backend behind a swappable adapter.

plugins.name: content-discovery
plugins.description: Find and pitch current, profile-specific content ideas from an authored content profile, using a saved reservoir plus Reddit research.
